role_title: Corporate Finance, Revenue Operations - Associate / Assistant Vice President

location.office_time_required: Monday-Thursday in office, remote on Friday

level_signals: 3+ years of corporate accounting or public accounting experience
Title range Associate / Assistant Vice President

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of corporate accounting or public accounting experience within the financial services industry
must_haves.qualifier: corporate accounting or public accounting within financial services industry

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Outstanding financial analysis skills and knowledge of accounting principles and US GAAP reporting
Strong ability to apply critical thinking skills to analyze complex issues and propose effective solutions, while consistently maintaining a meticulous attention to detail
Organized and detail-oriented process manager who can prioritize and communicate clearly with senior leadership
Experience with revenue, treasury management, accounts receivable and payable, and cash reconciliations
Knowledge of booking journal entries and preparation of financial statements
Data-driven thinker who can manage large data sets for efficient analyses
Proficient with Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook)
Excellent verbal and written communication skills
Able to coordinate across teams and departments to complete projects

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: CPA license is preferred but not required
Degree in Accounting is preferred but not required
Familiar with Oracle NetSuite or other general ledger systems (i.e. Quickbooks) is preferred
Familiar with alternative investments or structured investments is preferred

scope.surface: Revenue Control team within Corporate Finance; primarily Technology Solutions product line revenue
scope.business_model: B2B fintech / alternative investment platform (technology solutions and managed services)
primary_metrics_inferred: Accounts receivable and cash reconciliation accuracy
cross_functional_partners: Business unit and product line leads
core_responsibilities: Perform revenue calculations and controls for various product lines, primarily Technology Solutions
Ensure precision in monthly and quarterly revenue estimates and actuals with variance analyses
Support full revenue cycle including order processing, invoicing, payment collection and revenue recognition
Spearhead month-end close processes, preparing revenue calculations and accruals
Calculate and consolidate P&L and balance sheet data with accurate journal entries
Execute cash application processes and prepare monthly cash reconciliations
Support implementation of new order-to-cash billing and receivable software
Develop insightful reporting and analyses for management and investors
Identify process gaps and implement robust internal controls
Leverage automation tools and data-driven workflows to improve efficiency

compensation.equity_form: equity for all full-time employees (form not specified)

green_flags: Equity offered to all full-time employees
Comprehensive benefits package including 100% employer-paid dental, vision, telemedicine, and virtual mental health counseling
Clear scope of responsibilities with specific product line focus (Technology Solutions)
CPA and accounting degree are preferred but not required, reducing hard credential barriers
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires Monday-Thursday in office; location of the office is not specified in the JD body, which could be a mismatch for remote candidates
Title range (Associate to AVP) suggests wide salary and seniority ambiguity; exact level may depend on candidate profile
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title range, years requirement, and comp range)
seniority.manages_people (inferred false; no management language in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from iCapital's known product description and JD context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
location.cities_listed (no specific city named for this role in the JD body)
ambiguities: The JD does not specify which city the office is in; candidates cannot determine commuting feasibility from the JD alone.
The dual title 'Associate / Assistant Vice President' creates ambiguity about seniority level and compensation band — the full $90K–$140K range spans both levels.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not addressed anywhere in the JD.
